Phase: 10
Sequence: 059
Slug: genai-sql-xss-no-dompurify
Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE
Rationale: GenAIExplanationDrawer and GenAISuggestionsDrawer render LLM-generated content via renderMarkdown (sanitizeTextPanelContent applied); the LLM output is produced server-side and returned to the same user who invoked it — there is no cross-user or cross-privilege trust boundary crossing, and the xss library sanitizer mitigates common payload patterns.
Severity-Original: N/A
PoC-Status: N/A
Origin-Finding: security/findings-draft/p8-044-plugin-readme-xss-no-sanitization.md
Origin-Pattern: AP-044

## Summary

`GenAIExplanationDrawer.tsx:24` and `GenAISuggestionsDrawer.tsx:114` render LLM-generated SQL explanations/suggestions via `renderMarkdown()` and `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`. The content is generated by an LLM in response to the current user's SQL query. `renderMarkdown` applies `sanitizeTextPanelContent` (xss library), which filters common XSS vectors. While a prompt-injection attack could theoretically cause the LLM to return HTML with XSS payloads, (1) this would only affect the same user who initiated the query (no cross-user path), (2) the `sanitizeTextPanelContent` sanitizer is applied before rendering and blocks `<script>` and event handler injection as confirmed by the markdown.test.ts test suite, and (3) this requires a non-default LLM integration to be configured.

## Location

- `public/app/features/expressions/components/SqlExpressions/GenAI/GenAIExplanationDrawer.tsx:24`
- `public/app/features/expressions/components/SqlExpressions/GenAI/GenAISuggestionsDrawer.tsx:114`

## Attacker Control

None from external path. The content originates from an LLM responding to the current user's own input, displayed only to that same user.

## Trust Boundary Crossed

None — same user initiates request and receives response. No cross-user or cross-privilege exposure.

## Impact

N/A for external threat model.

## Evidence

1. `GenAIExplanationDrawer.tsx:24`: `renderMarkdown(explanation)` -- sanitizer applied via renderMarkdown
2. `markdown.test.ts:10-13`: `renderMarkdown('<script>alert()</script>')` returns `'&lt;script&gt;alert()&lt;/script&gt;'` -- confirmed sanitization
3. LLM content served only to the requesting user in a drawer context

## Reproduction Steps

N/A — not exploitable via external attacker-controlled path.
